questionHtml: Using Figure 7, identify the equilibrium quantity being consumed following the imposition of the tariff.
markschemeHtml:
Quantity = 6.5 million kilograms (million kgs) OR 6.5 is sufficient for [1].

NB Superfluous units may be ignored.
